text.title: Google Performance Max Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion lead-gen PMax: 95 conv/mo, 3 asset groups by audience theme, customer_match + remarketing signals, brand negatives on, Purchase weighted 1.0.
example.note: Floor met, 3 asset groups, signals attached, brand-cannibalization avoided.
